    Pigment¶

    In [1]:
    Copied! 
    from fdray import *


def render(*attrs):
    return Scene(
        Camera(30, 20, view_scale=2),
        LightSource(0, "white"),
        Box((-1, -1, -1), (1, 1, 1), *attrs),
    ).render(300, 300)
    from fdray import * def render(*attrs): return Scene( Camera(30, 20, view_scale=2), LightSource(0, "white"), Box((-1, -1, -1), (1, 1, 1), *attrs), ).render(300, 300)

    Solid Color Pigments¶

    In [2]:
    Copied! 
    render(Color("red"))
    render(Color("red"))
    Out[2]:

    Color List Pattern¶

    In [3]:
    Copied! 
    render(Pigment("brick", Color("red", 0.4), Color("blue")).scale(0.2))
    render(Pigment("brick", Color("red", 0.4), Color("blue")).scale(0.2))
    Out[3]:
    In [4]:
    Copied! 
    render(Pigment("checker", Color("ivory"), Color("cyan")).scale(0.4))
    render(Pigment("checker", Color("ivory"), Color("cyan")).scale(0.4))
    Out[4]:
    In [5]:
    Copied! 
    render(
    Pigment(
        "hexagon",
        Color("teal"),
        Color("navy"),
        Color("purple"),
    )
    .scale(0.2)
    .rotate("90*z"),
)
    render( Pigment( "hexagon", Color("teal"), Color("navy"), Color("purple"), ) .scale(0.2) .rotate("90*z"), )
    Out[5]:

    Color Map¶

    In [6]:
    Copied! 
    cmap = ColorMap((0, Color("red")), (0.5, Color("blue")), (1, Color("red")))
render(Pigment("gradient x", cmap))
    cmap = ColorMap((0, Color("red")), (0.5, Color("blue")), (1, Color("red"))) render(Pigment("gradient x", cmap))
    Out[6]:
    In [7]:
    Copied! 
    a = Pigment("granite", ColorMap((0, Color("red")), (0.9, Color("white"))))
b = Pigment("granite", ColorMap((0, Color("blue")), (0.9, Color("white"))))
p = Pigment("checker", a, b).scale(0.5)
render(p)
    a = Pigment("granite", ColorMap((0, Color("red")), (0.9, Color("white")))) b = Pigment("granite", ColorMap((0, Color("blue")), (0.9, Color("white")))) p = Pigment("checker", a, b).scale(0.5) render(p)
    Out[7]:
    In [8]:
    Copied! 
    p
    p
    Out[8]:
    pigment {
  checker
  pigment {
    granite
    color_map {
      [0 rgb <1, 0, 0>]
      [0.9 rgb <1, 1, 1>]
    }
  }
  pigment {
    granite
    color_map {
      [0 rgb <0, 0, 1>]
      [0.9 rgb <1, 1, 1>]
    }
  }
  scale 0.5
}

    Pigment Map¶

    In [9]:
    Copied! 
    p = Pigment("gradient z", PigmentMap((0, a), (0.5, b), (1, a)))
render(p)
    p = Pigment("gradient z", PigmentMap((0, a), (0.5, b), (1, a))) render(p)
    Out[9]:
    In [10]:
    Copied! 
    a = Declare(Pigment("agate", ColorMap((0, Color("red")), (0.9, Color("white")))))
b = Declare(Pigment("agate", ColorMap((0, Color("blue")), (0.9, Color("white")))))
p = Pigment("gradient x", PigmentMap((0, a), (0.5, b), (1, a)))
render(p)
    a = Declare(Pigment("agate", ColorMap((0, Color("red")), (0.9, Color("white"))))) b = Declare(Pigment("agate", ColorMap((0, Color("blue")), (0.9, Color("white"))))) p = Pigment("gradient x", PigmentMap((0, a), (0.5, b), (1, a))) render(p)
    Out[10]:
